note: Queue schema documentation. Delete this line in production.

fields.due_at_utc: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp for due logic
fields.messages: Array of 1+ strings, sent in order

rules: Due logic uses UTC only (compare due_at_utc against now_utc)
Messages are sent in order, one per heartbeat tick
Heartbeat is dumb - it only checks due_at_utc, no smart logic
